free_text: Comparative study of measured and critically
evaluated resonance integral to thermal cross-section
Part III. The same data except for
5 MW WWRS water boiler type reactor
Counting periods were always less than 5%
on the mean multiplied by Student's t-factor
corresponding to the limited number of experiments.
No information for the partial uncertainties.
